headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 28, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays edged out the Cleveland Guardians 1-0 in a low-scoring affair, with Jonathan Aranda driving in the game's only run. The Baltimore Orioles secured a 3-5 victory over the Houston Astros, with Shane Baz earning the win after 5.2 innings pitched. The St. Louis Cardinals secured a convincing 11-7 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Ryan O'Hearn's strong performance.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Detroit Tigers' Javier Báez (right ankle sprain) and Casey Mize (right adductor strain), who have both been placed on the injured list. Milwaukee Brewers' Angel Zerpa has been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 26 with left forearm tightness. Other notable injuries include Garrett Crochet (left shoulder inflammation) and Everson Pereira (right pectoral strain).

The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash, while the Toronto Blue Jays traded Willie MacIver to the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for Ty Cummings, and the Colorado Rockies traded Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Down Guardians in Low-Scoring Affair**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays edged out the Cleveland Guardians 1-0, securing a narrow victory. Jonathan Aranda led the Rays' offense with a single, driving in the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Orioles in 3-5 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 3-5 victory over the Houston Astros, with Shane Baz earning the win after 5.2 innings pitched. Brice Matthews led the Orioles' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, including a key single that scored Dustin Harris.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Reds in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 4-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Pirates 11-7**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a convincing 11-7 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates. Ryan O'Hearn led the Cardinals' offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs in 4 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Rays Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays suffered a 1-3 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Chandler Simpson and Yandy Díaz leading the Rays' offense. Drew Rasmussen struggled on the mound for the Rays, while Gavin Williams pitched effectively for the Guardians.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a close game to the Chicago White Sox, losing 2-3. Mike Trout and Vaughn Grissom had notable performances in the loss.

top_news.title: **Tigers Place Javier Báez on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers shortstop Javier Báez has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right ankle sprain.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire Tyler Fitzgerald in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald in a trade with the Toronto Blue Jays, who received cash in return.
